description: Style NoteThese floaters from gliders are an example of the brand's excellent craftsmanship. The synthetic upper and aggressive outsole showcase the brand's versatile power in innovating. These sandals are perfect for braving the Indian monsoon and for general rough use. Wear these with your off-duty essentials.Product DetailsBlunt toed floaters in blue with a slight heel, forefoot and ankle loop straps with Velcro closuresCurved foamy rubber footbed with patterned groovesPatterned nubs on the lightweight outsoleMaterial and CareSynthetic, rubberDo not machine wash or store in direct sunlightRemove dust with a dry clean cloth
